heading: Entries on land withdrawn as valuable for oil or gas validated
label: 144 Entries on land withdrawn as valuable for oil or gas validated
text: Entries existing on , and allowed prior to , under the Stock Raising Homestead Act of (Thirty-ninth Statutes at Large, page 862) [ et seq.], for land withdrawn as valuable for oil or gas, but not otherwise reserved or withdrawn, are validated, if otherwise regular: , That at date of entry the land was not within the limits of the geologic structure of a producing oil or gas field.February 7, 1925April 1, 1924December 29, 191643 U.S.C. 291Provided
notes: References in TextThe Stock Raising Homestead Act of , referred to in text, is , , which was classified generally to subchapter X (§ 291 et seq.) of chapter 7 of this title and was repealed by , §§ 702, 704(a), , , 2792, except for sections 9 and 11 which are classified to sections 299 and 301, respectively, of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.December 29, 1916Oct. 21, 1976act Dec. 29, 1916, ch. 939 Stat. 862Pub.
